description: Synthetic-first journal fixture corpus (SSOT Step 1.1). Hand-authored, PII-free, covering every §5.1 event plus the format edge cases the tailer/watcher must survive. The repo is treated as public from commit #1; every parseable line must satisfy findPiiLeaks() === [] (gated by scrub-journal.test.ts). Real captures may only be added after passing scrubJournalContent().

files.name: Journal.2025-06-01T120000.01.log
files.role: mining session (part 1): load, travel, ring scan, prospect, refine

files.name: Journal.2025-06-01T120000.02.log
files.role: mining session (part 2): relog within 20 min continues the session, then travel + sell

files.name: Journal.2025-06-01T140000.01.log
files.role: carrier events (§5.1, parsed in Phase 8; present now for corpus coverage)

files.name: edge-bom.log
files.role: UTF-8 BOM prefix on the first line

files.name: edge-partial-last-line.log
files.role: actively-growing file whose final line is a partial write with no trailing newline

files.name: edge-truncated-midline.log
files.role: a malformed, newline-terminated line in the middle, valid lines on either side
